tagline: You can now limit the permissions of personal access tokens by selecting a token type and adding API scopes.
what_it_does: You can now limit the permissions of personal access tokens by selecting a token type and adding API scopes. This restricts each token to only the API operations you specify. This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now limit the permissions of personal access tokens by selecting a token type and adding API scopes. This restricts each token to only the API operations you specify.
key_takeaway: You can now limit the permissions of personal access tokens by selecting a token type and adding API scopes.
